metadata.description: A Gremlin model, based on the Apache TinkerPop Gremlin ANTLR grammar (version 3.8.1). This is a streamlined model: it preserves the semantics of the grammar (steps, predicates, arguments, literals) while collapsing pure parser-production artifacts (single-use 'XAndY'/'XOrY' glue types and left-recursion 'rest' continuations) so that the representation maps cleanly onto TinkerPop's native traversal model.
